name: Multi-Modal Document Processing
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Document Intelligence
services.purpose: OCR extraction — tables, forms, handwriting, complex layouts from scanned docs

services.name: Azure OpenAI (GPT-4o)
services.purpose: Vision-enabled analysis — chart interpretation, diagram understanding, multi-modal Q&A

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Document ingestion — PDFs, images, scanned forms, processing outputs

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Document processing orchestrator — chunking, routing, post-processing pipeline

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Extracted data store — structured fields, metadata, processing status tracking

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Full-text + vector search over extracted document content for downstream RAG

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, storage SAS tokens, processing pipeline secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Processing pipeline metrics — extraction accuracy, throughput, error rates

optimization_tips: Use Document Intelligence prebuilt models before training custom models — often sufficient for invoices, receipts, IDs
Route simple text PDFs through OCR only; reserve GPT-4o vision for charts, diagrams, and complex layouts
Batch document processing during off-peak hours using Azure Functions timer triggers
Use Blob lifecycle policies to auto-tier processed documents to Cool/Archive storage — saves 50-70%
Cache extraction results in Cosmos DB — avoid re-processing identical documents
Start with AI Search Free/Basic tier for dev — upgrade only when index size or query volume demands it
